title: Short Players
description: Client-Side mod that makes all players look short and funny
body:
## This Client-Side mod makes it so that all players that you see look short (AKA missing torso)

![picture0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fd06136a6ea2d4af49ddc493afb858289392323.png)
___

![picture1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa5eb83890cd690808bfa45217ee0ede6a897bd6.png)

![picture2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa44aad5b949458a6b9c8a099b6a4e0f40a906f8.png)

![picture3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c0dd900f03e1ebd3c333ba7d05d51b70ef58b7b.png)

___

_As stated before; this is a Client-Side mod so it should not be installed on the server_
